candidates.why: Generic top-line label; good fallback if Total Revenue not populated in some years.
Component of shipping revenue; useful if aggregate totals change labeling or are missing historically.
Major segment revenue line; part of total revenue and may exist when aggregate total does not.
Major segment revenue line; complements shipping revenue and may be reported when total not available.
Additional product services component; included as low-priority fallback.
Explicit aggregate revenue line summing all revenue components; best representation of top-line sales.
This is clearly cost of goods sold, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.

variables.notes: Total Revenue is the primary top-line; other revenue lines are provided as fallbacks in case of label changes or missing years.

candidates.why: Explicitly labeled cost of revenues/COGS, matching the target definition of cost of goods sold / cost of sales.

variables.notes: Direct production/service costs are captured in the Cost of revenues/COGS line.

candidates.why: Classic SG&A overhead category; clearly part of operating overhead and not COGS or D&A.
Mixed operating expense/income line; treated as part of operating overhead since no cleaner SG&A total exists.
Appears to be a duplicate/alternative label but with no data in preview; still a potential SG&A-like bucket.
Day-to-day operating costs of vessels; in this shipping context these are operating overhead distinct from COGS/voyage expenses.
Balance sheet liability, not a P&L expense; should not be included in SG&A components.

variables.notes: Selected SG&A components exclude totals and non-P&L items. The balance-sheet liability and the empty duplicate Other operating (expenses)/income net line are not used.
No R&D-related candidate rows were provided; treated as zero for PROF purposes.

candidates.row_label: Remeasurement of equity interest in joint venture
candidates.why: Fair value/remeasurement item related to equity interests, not interest expense.
Primary interest expense line covering total interest costs; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; subsidiary component of total interest expense and a good fallback if main line missing.
Non-lease interest cost component; another detailed interest expense line and good secondary fallback.
Represents profit attributable to minorities, not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interest; equity attribution, not interest expense.
Same as above; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; can serve as a low-priority fallback for XINT.
Equity account for minorities; not interest expense.
Same as above; not interest expense.
Accrued interest liability; can be used as very low-priority proxy if P&L interest is unavailable.
Label suggests interest-related amount, but context is unclear from preview; potential low-priority fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority is given to the main P&L Interest Expense line, then its components; balance sheet interest-related lines are last-resort fallbacks. Non-controlling interest lines are excluded as they are equity allocations, not interest.

candidates.row_label: Fair value (loss)/gain from equity financial asset
candidates.why: Income statement fair value movement; not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Remeasurement of equity interest in joint venture
candidates.why: P&L remeasurement item; not a balance sheet equity total.
Represents profit attributable to equity holders, not the stock of equity itself.

candidates.row_label: Equity investments at FVOCI - fair value loss
candidates.why: OCI item, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity financial assets, at fair value
candidates.why: Asset account, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity Financial Assets at Fair Value
candidates.why: Same as above; asset, not equity.
Represents total equity attributable (likely to owners); good measure of book equity.
Explicit total shareholders’ equity line; best match for book equity including shareholders’ interests.

variables.notes: Uses balance sheet equity totals; P&L equity-related items and equity financial assets are not appropriate for book equity.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation to non-controlling interests; relevant for minority interest but P&L-based.
Alternate label for non-controlling interest on the income statement.
OCI/comprehensive income attribution to minorities; still refers to minority interest.
Balance sheet carrying amount of minorities’ equity; primary line for MIB.
Alternate balance sheet label for minority equity; good fallback if primary NCI line changes.

variables.notes: Primary measure is the balance sheet non-controlling interests; income statement minority-interest lines are included as lower-priority fallbacks for consistency over time.
